_comment: This is a TEMPLATE. Run src/utils/calibrate.py to generate the real file for your store.
_counting_region_help: OPTIONAL. The area that counts as your storefront. People whose feet fall outside it are ignored (e.g. someone across the street). Draw it with:  python -m visionmetrics.edge.tools.draw_zone --source 0 --config configs/store_config.json . Omit the block to count everywhere.
